body:
Hey, just a reminder, you said last Sunday you'd start jotting down a quick weekly rundown of everything going on with the kids' schedules so we're both on the same page. I know your week is slammed at school but it would really help me keep track, especially with Owen's basketball and Nora's art club picking back up.

Even just a few bullet points is fine. Doesn't have to be long., Greg
snippet: Hey, just a reminder, you said last Sunday you'd start jotting down a quick...
subject: Weekly family rundown

body:
You're right, I completely dropped the ball on that. This week got away from me, we had two late afternoons with parent meetings and I've basically been in reactive mode since Tuesday.

I'll write something up tonight after the kids are down. Probably just a quick Google Doc with the highlights: practices, pickups, and what's coming up next week. Sound good?, Kelly
snippet: You're right, I completely dropped the ball on that. This week got away from me ...
subject: Re: Weekly family rundown

body:
Hey! Are you free any day this week for lunch? I've been craving that Thai place on Meridian, the one with the mango salad we liked last time. Let me know what works, I'm pretty flexible Thursday or Friday.

Also I have some news I want to tell you in person so don't let me forget lol.

Renee
snippet: Hey! Are you free any day this week for lunch? I've been craving that Thai place...
subject: lunch this week?

body:
Yes!! I was literally just thinking about that place. Thursday works perfectly, I have a meeting in the morning but I'm free by noon. Should we say 12:30?

And now I'm obviously going to be thinking about what the news is all week, thanks for that haha. Can't wait!

Kelly
snippet: Yes!! I was literally just thinking about that place. Thursday works perfectly -...
subject: Re: lunch this week?

body:
12:30 Thursday is perfect, I'll meet you there! And sorry not sorry, I needed the suspense to make sure you actually showed up 😂

See you then!

Renee
snippet: 12:30 Thursday is perfect, I'll meet you there! And sorry not sorry, I needed th...
subject: Re: lunch this week?

body:
Hey, hope your morning is going okay. I know you're slammed this week but I could really use a second pair of eyes on the kitchen renovation layout before I finalize things with the contractor on Thursday. I've been going back and forth on whether to move the island or keep it where it is, and I can't tell if I'm overthinking it.

Would you have 20 minutes tonight to look at the updated floor plan? I can pull it up on the laptop after dinner. No pressure if you're too wiped, I can always ask your mom, but you have better spatial instincts than she does.

Greg
snippet: Hey, hope your morning is going okay. I know you're slammed this week but I coul...
subject: Quick design review request

body:
Ha, please don't ask my mom or we'll end up with a backsplash we hate for the next 20 years. I can look tonight, yeah. Send me the file now so I can peek at it between meetings and come in with some thoughts ready.

Also, I think moving the island is the right call if it gives us more clearance on the sink side. That corner always felt cramped. But let's look at it together before you commit anything.

Kelly
snippet: Ha, please don't ask my mom or we'll end up with a backsplash we hate for the ne...
subject: Re: Quick design review request

body:
Haha fair point on your mom. Attaching the PDF, there are two versions, A and B. Version B is the one with the island shifted about 18 inches toward the dining room side. The contractor said either works structurally, it's purely a preference call.

I'm leaning B but the countertop run on that side gets a little shorter and I wasn't sure how you'd feel about that. Also flagged a question on page 3 about the pendant light placement, that one I genuinely have no idea on.

Greg
snippet: Haha fair point on your mom. Attaching the PDF, there are two versions, A and B...
subject: Re: Quick design review request

body:
Okay I looked at both on my lunch break. Go with B, the extra clearance is worth the shorter countertop, we barely use that stretch anyway. For the pendants, I'd center them over the island in the new position rather than keeping them where they're marked, otherwise they'll look off.

Can you shoot the contractor a note tonight confirming B so he has it before Thursday? I'll look at the full thing again with you after dinner but I think you're basically there.

Kelly
snippet: Okay I looked at both on my lunch break. Go with B, the extra clearance is wort...
subject: Re: Quick design review request

body:
Hey, wanted to get us on the same page before the weekend. I looked at flights to Asheville and the best option leaves Friday the 27th at 6:45am out of Richmond. That's early but it gets us there by 9am and gives us the whole day. Should I book two tickets?

Also, did you end up hearing back from the Airbnb host about the early check-in? I know checkout at the place we were at last time was a pain.
snippet: Hey, wanted to get us on the same page before the weekend. I looked at flights t...
subject: Trip logistics - need to finalize a few things

body:
6:45am is brutal but honestly worth it if it means we get a full Friday. Go ahead and book it, use my Discover card so I can hit the cashback this month.

The host messaged me back this morning. Early check-in isn't guaranteed but she said she'll try to have it ready by 11. Worst case we can just drop bags and grab breakfast somewhere on Lexington Ave. I've been wanting to try that biscuit place anyway.

Can you also figure out the car situation? I don't think we need to rent one if we're staying close to downtown.
snippet: 6:45am is brutal but honestly worth it if it means we get a full Friday. Go ahea...
subject: Re: Trip logistics - need to finalize a few things

body:
Flights booked! Confirmation should be in your email too. Total was $318 for both which is pretty reasonable.

I looked at the map and I think you're right about the car. Everything we want to do looks walkable or a quick Lyft. I'll just download the app again before we leave so we're not scrambling at the airport.

One thing, do you want to do a dinner reservation anywhere on Saturday night? I saw that place Cúrate has openings but they go fast. Just say the word and I'll grab one.
snippet: Flights booked! Confirmation should be in your email too. Total was $318 for bot...
subject: Re: Trip logistics - need to finalize a few things

body:
YES book Cúrate, please do it now before it fills up. Saturday at 7:30 or 8 if they have it. That place has been on my list forever.

Also I just remembered, my mom asked if we could bring back some jam from that farm store we went to two years ago. I can't remember the name but I think it was off 191 heading toward Weaverville. Do you remember it? Maybe we can do a quick stop on the way back Sunday.
snippet: YES book Cúrate, please do it now before it fills up. Saturday at 7:30 or 8 if t...
subject: Re: Trip logistics - need to finalize a few things

body:
Got us 7:30 at Cúrate on Saturday. They had one slot left, lucky timing.

I think the farm store your mom means is Looking Glass Creamery or maybe Hickory Nut Gap Farm, I'll look it up and add it to the map. We can easily swing by Sunday before heading to the airport, we have plenty of time before the 4pm flight.

I think we're all set. I'll pack the small bag and we can share it so we don't have to check anything. Remind me Friday morning to grab the portable charger off my desk.
snippet:
Got us 7:30 at Cúrate on Saturday. They had one slot left, lucky timing.

I thin...
subject: Re: Trip logistics - need to finalize a few things

body:
Hey, just got a letter in the mail from American Home Shield, our warranty is up for renewal at the end of the month. It's $620 for the year again. Do you want to keep it or shop around? I know we didn't use it much this year, but with the HVAC being as old as it is I'm kind of thinking we should just renew.

Let me know what you think and I can take care of it online tonight if you want to go ahead.
snippet: Hey, just got a letter in the mail from American Home Shield, our warranty is u...
subject: Home Warranty Renewal

body:
Honestly, I'd say renew it. You're right about the HVAC, that thing is on borrowed time and a repair or replacement would cost way more than $620. I'd rather have the peace of mind.

Go ahead and pay it tonight. Just use the joint checking account and keep the confirmation email somewhere we can find it. Thanks for handling it!, Kelly
snippet: Honestly, I'd say renew it. You're right about the HVAC, that thing is on borro...
subject: Re: Home Warranty Renewal

body:
Hey, did you see the email from Renee about the 8th grade transition night this week? She mentioned they're planning to start setup Friday around 5pm but I don't see anything on the shared calendar yet. Wanted to flag it since you said you'd be tied up with end-of-year paperwork.

Are you looped in on this or do I need to follow up with her directly?
snippet: Hey, did you see the email from Renee about the 8th grade transition night...
subject: transition night plan

body:
Yeah I saw it, I was going to reply to her this afternoon. The Friday setup time works for me as long as we have the sign-in tables and folders ready before families start arriving. I already asked the front office to have the name tags printed by Thursday.

Can you just confirm with her that we're aligned on the 5pm start? Also make sure someone can stay a little late for cleanup in case it runs long. Last year a few families showed up right at the end and we were scrambling.

I'll send the reminder to the rest of the team once the room is confirmed.
snippet: Yeah I saw it, I was going to reply to her this afternoon. The Friday setup...
subject: Re: transition night plan

body:
Confirmed with Renee, she's good with the 5pm Friday setup and said the front office already has the name tags handled so that's covered.

She's also going to stay a bit late to help with cleanup just in case. I think we're set. I'll add the transition night to the shared calendar now so it doesn't get lost.

Let me know if anything changes on your end before Friday.
snippet: Confirmed with Renee, she's good with the 5pm Friday setup and said the front...
subject: Re: transition night plan

body: College and career readiness for the 8th graders; planning the fall night.
